name: hive
description: Hive memory over MCP — journal, tasks, search, and recall from Claude Desktop, against the hive store on this machine.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the hive on THIS machine: the extension launches the `hive-bridge` binary (stdio MCP), which opens the local hive data dir directly. No server, no URL, no token — hive is personal and local-first (DIRECTION.md D25). Requires `hive-bridge` on PATH: `cargo install --path bridge` from the hive repo (the Phase 2 app bundles take over real packaging, including bundling the binary into this extension). Interim-mode caveat: the data dir takes a single-writer lock, so the hive desktop app and this extension can't run at the same time — close the app while Claude Desktop is connected. The Phase 2.4 proxy removes that restriction.
